styles.name: American Modern
styles.prompt: contemporary American superhero comic style, bold vibrant colors, dynamic heroic poses, detailed muscular anatomy, cinematic action scenes, modern digital art

styles.name: Manga
styles.prompt: Japanese manga style, clean precise black linework, screen tone shading, expressive eyes, dynamic speed lines, black and white with impact effects

styles.name: Noir
styles.prompt: film noir style, high contrast black and white, deep dramatic shadows, 1940s detective aesthetic, heavy bold inking, moody atmospheric lighting

styles.name: Vintage
styles.prompt: Golden Age retro comic style, visible halftone dots, limited nostalgic palette, warm paper texture, classic adventure comic feeling

styles.name: Color Manga
styles.prompt: full-color Japanese manga style, clean precise linework, vibrant cel shading, expressive eyes, dynamic action composition, rich colorful highlights, dramatic lighting, manga-inspired impact effects, polished anime aesthetic, detailed character rendering, vivid background colors

styles.name: Chibi Color Manga
styles.prompt: full-color Japanese manga style, all characters in cute chibi style, oversized heads, small bodies, simplified anatomy, clean precise linework, expressive big eyes, vibrant cel shading, lively poses, colorful highlights, manga-inspired effects, playful and charming atmosphere, polished anime aesthetic

styles.name: Pop Art
styles.prompt: pop art style, bold black outlines, vibrant high-contrast colors, comic-book aesthetic, halftone dot patterns, graphic shapes, retro poster feel, exaggerated expressions, flat color blocks, playful visual impact, iconic pop culture inspired design
